name: OHIO VALLEY BANC CORP
business: OHIO VALLEY BANC CORP is a community bank that provides loans and financial services primarily to individuals and small to medium-sized businesses in Ohio and West Virginia.
sellsTo: Small to medium-sized businesses in Ohio and West Virginia

exposures.sentence: Digital or cryptocurrencies, blockchain, and other fintech technologies are being developed to change the way banks operate and are eliminating the need for banks as financial deposit-keepers and intermediaries.

Cyber-attacks and data security breaches. Management cannot be certain that the security controls we have adopted will prevent unauthorized access to our computer systems or those of our third-party service providers, whom we require to maintain similar controls.
